metadata.title: OpenCitadel
metadata.description: OpenCitadel is an action engine that goes beyond answers—it executes tasks, automates workflows, and extends your capabilities.

auth.loginDescription: Sign in to use AI chat, code knowledge base, document Q&A, and more.
auth.loginPageDescription: Use a local account or SSO to enter your workspace.
auth.registerDescription: Create an account using the invite link from your administrator.
auth.loginToCreateTask: Sign in to create a new task
auth.loginToChat: Sign in to start AI chat
auth.loginToSelectModel: Sign in to select a model
auth.loginToMarketplace: Sign in to use AI smart launch
auth.loginToDocQa: Sign in to use AI document Q&A
auth.loginToTranslate: Sign in to use AI translation

home.subtitle: What can I do for you?
home.addModelFirst: Please add a model in Settings first
home.codebaseDescription: Upload a codebase, generate architecture diagrams and call chains, Ask Q&A / Agent code edits

chatInput.uploadError: An error occurred during file upload
chatInput.placeholder: Assign a task or ask any question...

sessionList.deleteFailed: Failed to delete task "{title}", please retry

sessions.streamDisconnected: Live session list connection lost. Please refresh manually.
sessions.hookError: useSessions must be used within SessionsProvider

sessionHeader.tokenUsageTitle: Prompt: {prompt} · Completion: {completion} · Calls: {calls} · Click for details

sessionDetail.taskFailed: Task execution failed. Adjust settings and send a message to continue.
sessionDetail.streamStale: Background task is recovering; the event stream is temporarily interrupted.
sessionDetail.streamError: Session stream connection error. Attempting to recover.
sessionDetail.emptyTimeline: No conversation yet. Enter a task or question below.

sessionMemory.sheetDescription: View and edit Agent short-term context (Tier 1)

sessionDebug.title: Debug events
sessionDebug.description: Internal planner output, reasoning, and tool args — not shown in regular chat bubbles.
sessionDebug.empty: No debug events yet. Opening this panel requests debug events; new planner, reasoning, and tool args will appear here.

filePreview.previewUnsupported: Preview not supported for this file type
filePreview.downloadHint: You can download the file to view it

attachmentsMessage.viewAllFiles: View all files in this task

deleteSession.title: Delete this task?
deleteSession.description: All chat history for this task will be permanently deleted and cannot be recovered. Uploaded and generated files will no longer be accessible or downloadable.

checkpoint.title: Confirm restore checkpoint
checkpoint.description: Restore to "{label}"? All conversations, agent memory, sandbox files, and cloud file records after this point will be deleted.

clarify.defaultTitle: A few key points need confirmation

errorPage.title: Page failed to load
errorPage.unknown: An unknown error occurred. Please retry or return home.

settings.title: OpenCitadel Settings
settings.maxIterationsDesc: Maximum number of tool call loops for the agent, default 100
settings.maxSearchResultsDesc: By default, each search step includes 10 results.
settings.a2aDescription: Model Context Protocol (MCP) enhances OpenCitadel by integrating external tools such as private search, web browsing, ordering, PPT generation, and more.
settings.noA2aAgents: No A2A agents yet. Click above to add one.
settings.mcpAddDescription: OpenCitadel uses standard JSON MCP configuration. Paste your config below and click Add.
settings.a2aAddDescription: OpenCitadel uses the standard A2A protocol to connect remote agents. Paste your config below and click Add.
settings.noMcpServers: No MCP servers yet. Click above to add one.

settingsModels.description: Add models from multiple providers globally; sessions can choose which to use
settingsModels.noModels: No models yet. Add one to get started.
settingsModels.apiKeyLeaveBlank: API Key (leave blank to keep unchanged)
settingsModels.supportsMultimodalDesc: When enabled, user images and browser screenshots can be sent directly to the model
settingsModels.visionWithTools: Send images even when tools are attached

settingsSkills.description: Create skill templates; sessions can opt in (disabled by default)
settingsSkills.name: Name
settingsSkills.toolWhitelistHint: Wildcards supported, e.g. mcp_* (all MCP) or mcp_jina_* (specific MCP service)
settingsSkills.boundMcpServers: Bound MCP servers (empty = all enabled servers)
settingsSkills.boundA2aServers: Bound A2A servers (empty = all enabled servers)

settingsMemory.description: Cross-session memory management; recalled and injected into the agent when tasks start

vnc.sandboxClosedHint: The sandbox may have shut down. Confirm the task is still running.
vnc.sandboxDisconnectedAbnormal: The sandbox may have closed or the connection dropped unexpectedly
vnc.authFailed: Authentication failed; cannot connect to sandbox
vnc.connectionFailedNotStarted: Could not connect; the sandbox may not be running

compliance.evidenceCenterDesc: Download immutable evidence packages for governed Web Operator sessions
compliance.evidenceSessionsDesc: Sessions with operator scope or gate profile
compliance.reportDesc: 等保2.0 + ISO27001 control mapping against platform capabilities
compliance.reportHint: Select a time range and generate a report

marketplace.selectApp: Select an app to get started
marketplace.loadFailed: Failed to load app list, using local config
marketplace.enterTask: Please enter what you want to accomplish
marketplace.localMatch: Opened app based on local match
marketplace.heroTitle: Describe your goal, launch the right AI app
marketplace.heroDescription: Search, vision analysis, document Q&A, translation, and prompt optimization in one lightweight marketplace.
marketplace.commandPlaceholder: What do you want to do? e.g. search Three Body / analyze meal / translate English
marketplace.featuredDesc: Popular AI mini-apps, click to use
marketplace.allAppsDesc: Discover capabilities by category or keyword
marketplace.noMatchHint: Try a different keyword or use the AI command bar above

documentQa.name: Document/Image Q&A
documentQa.description: Upload materials or screenshots, AI extracts key points and answers questions
examples: Tell me what's wrong in this screenshot

smartTranslation.name: Smart translation
smartTranslation.description: Auto-detect language, translate in formal/casual/technical style
examples: Translate this English to formal Chinese

promptLab.name: Prompt lab
promptLab.description: Turn rough ideas into reusable high-quality prompts
examples: Write a data analysis Agent prompt
Optimize this customer service reply prompt

qrGenerator.name: QR code generator
qrGenerator.description: Quickly generate downloadable QR code images from text or links
examples: Make a QR code from this text

devToolbox.name: Developer toolbox
devToolbox.description: JSON formatting, Base64 and URL encode/decode in one place

secretGenerator.name: Password & UUID generator
secretGenerator.description: Generate configurable-strength passwords and batch UUIDs

documentConverter.name: Document format converter
documentConverter.description: md/txt to PDF, PDF to Word, common document format conversion

watermarkTool.name: Watermark tool
watermarkTool.description: Add watermarks to images/PDF, AI remove watermarks from images and PDFs

imageUpload.defaultHint: Click or drag JPG/PNG here, max 5MB

documentQa.title: Document/Image Q&A
documentQa.subtitle: Upload text materials or screenshots and let AI extract key points and answer your questions
documentQa.uploadedToast: Material uploaded, you can start asking questions
documentQa.uploadAndQuestionRequired: Please upload material and enter a question first
documentQa.supportedFormats: Supports images, txt, md, csv, json, log — max 8MB
documentQa.questionLabel: What would you like to ask?
documentQa.questionPlaceholder: e.g. summarize key points, find risks, explain errors in a screenshot
documentQa.emptyHint: Great for meeting notes, logs, screenshot errors, and structured text

smartTranslation.title: Smart translation
smartTranslation.subtitle: Auto-detect language and output natural translations by scenario style
smartTranslation.fileUploadedToast: File uploaded, can translate together with text
smartTranslation.textOrFileRequired: Please enter text or upload an image/text file
smartTranslation.sourceTextPlaceholder: Paste text to translate, or upload a screenshot or text file

promptLab.title: Prompt lab
promptLab.subtitle: Turn rough ideas into structured, reusable, controllable high-quality prompts
promptLab.ideaPlaceholder: e.g. help me do competitive research and output a table with action items

styleHints.agent: You are a reliable AI Agent. Clarify the goal first, break down tasks, call tools when needed, and deliver verifiable results.
styleHints.analysis: You are a senior analyst. List assumptions, data definitions, key findings, risks, and next-step recommendations.
styleHints.writing: You are a professional content editor. Confirm audience and tone first, then output clear, publish-ready content.

generated.step1: 1. Restate the goal and constraints in 1–2 sentences.
generated.step2: 2. If information is insufficient, ask at most 2 key clarifying questions.
generated.step3: 3. Break the task into executable steps and explain the rationale for each.
generated.step4: 4. Separate conclusions, evidence, risks, and follow-up actions in the output.
generated.step5: 5. Mark uncertain content clearly; do not fabricate sources or data.

qrGenerator.title: QR code generator
qrGenerator.subtitle: Enter text, links, or contact info to generate a downloadable QR code in real time
qrGenerator.generateFailed: QR code generation failed, please check your input
qrGenerator.contentPlaceholder: e.g. https://example.com or WeChat ID / contact info
qrGenerator.autoGenerateHint: QR code generates automatically after you enter content

devToolbox.title: Developer toolbox
devToolbox.subtitle: JSON formatting, Base64 and URL encode/decode — processed locally, never uploaded
devToolbox.urlEncodePlaceholder: Enter text or parameters to encode

secretGenerator.title: Password & UUID generator
secretGenerator.subtitle: Generate strong passwords and UUIDs with browser crypto — computed locally, never uploaded
secretGenerator.selectCharsetRequired: Please select at least one character type

documentConverter.title: Document format converter
documentConverter.subtitle: Local md/txt to PDF; PDF to Word and common format conversion (docx→pdf not supported yet)
documentConverter.loginRequired: Sign in to use document format conversion
documentConverter.unsupportedFormat: Only md, txt, pdf, and docx files are supported
documentConverter.selectFileAndFormat: Please select a file and target format
documentConverter.convertCompleteToast: Conversion complete, you can download the result
documentConverter.printWindowFailed: Could not open print window — allow pop-ups and retry
documentConverter.printHint: Choose "Save as PDF" in the print dialog

watermarkTool.title: Watermark tool
watermarkTool.subtitle: Local text watermarks on images; PDF add/remove and AI image watermark removal via backend (best-effort)
watermarkTool.imageOrPdfOnly: Only images or PDF are supported
watermarkTool.imageWatermarkDone: Image watermark ready, you can download
watermarkTool.loginRequired: Sign in to use AI watermark tools
watermarkTool.removeWatermarkDoneBestEffort: Watermark removal complete (best-effort in some scenarios)
watermarkTool.imageUploadHint: Upload JPG/PNG image to add text watermark locally
watermarkTool.pdfWatermarkTextPlaceholder: Fill in if you know the watermark text

knowledge.selectKbHint: Select a knowledge base to start Q&A
knowledge.vectorDegraded: Semantic search is disabled or vectors are unavailable; BM25 search is used instead.
knowledge.emptyTitle: Select or create a knowledge base to start Q&A
knowledge.sessionPreparing: Session is preparing, please wait before asking
knowledge.sourceHint: Click a document citation in an answer to view the source

addDialog.title: Add knowledge documents
addDialog.description: Upload PDF, Office, Markdown, or text files, or add a web page URL
addDialog.urlRequired: Please enter a web page URL

createDialog.title: New document knowledge base
createDialog.description: After creation, upload enterprise documents, web pages, or online doc links to build a RAG index

codebase.selectHint: Select a codebase to start analysis
codebase.emptyTitle: Select or create a codebase to start analysis
codebase.sourceHint: Click a file or path in an answer to view source

createDialog.title: New code knowledge base
createDialog.description: Upload a zip, Git repository, or multiple files — the system will analyze and build a dedicated code knowledge base
createDialog.gitUrlRequired: Please enter a Git repository URL
createDialog.zipRequired: Please upload a zip archive first
